name: Scottish Pride Cup Cakes
recipeInstructions:
To Make the Basic Cake Batter:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and prepare 28 to 30 muffin cups by lightly greasing or lining with paper.
2. In a large mixing bowl, stir together flour, sugar, and baking powder until well combined.
3. Add soft butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract. Mix on low speed of an electric mixer for 1 minute to blend, scraping sides of the bowl. Beat for 3 minutes until smooth.
To Make Marmalade Cupcakes:
1. Divide batter in half.
2. Stir marmalade into half of the batter. Spoon into muffin cups, filling each about halfway full.
To Make Chocolate Cupcakes:
1. Beat chocolate and 2 tbsp of strong coffee into the remaining half of the batter until well blended at medium speed.
2. Spoon batter into muffin cups.
3. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 18 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Cool on wire racks.
